# terrible_community_general_xbps (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `accept_pubkey` (Boolean) Whether or not repository signing keys should be automatically accepted.
- `name` (String) Name of the package to install, upgrade, or remove.
- `recurse` (Boolean) When removing a package, also remove its dependencies, provided that they are not required by other packages and were not explicitly installed by a user.
- `repositories` (String) Repository URL(s) to prepend to the repository list for the package installation. The URL can be remote repositories or paths for local repositories.
- `root` (String) The full path for the target root directory.
- `state` (String) Desired state of the package.
- `update_cache` (Boolean) Whether or not to refresh the master package lists. This can be run as part of a package installation or as a separate step.
- `upgrade` (Boolean) Whether or not to upgrade whole system.
- `upgrade_xbps` (Boolean) Whether or not to upgrade the `xbps` package when necessary. Before installing new packages, `xbps` requires the user to update itself. Thus when this option is set to `false`, upgrades and installations fail when `xbps` is not up to date.

### Read-Only

- `msg` (String) Message about results.
- `packages` (String) Packages that are affected/would be affected.
